    D

    DefectPipelineException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error
    Thrown when an instruction pipeline is broken or cannot be executed properly due to internal errors.
    DefectPipelineException(String, Exception) - Constructor for exception class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error.DefectPipelineException
     
    description() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.ConfigInstruction
